title: Combat+
description: New weapons using entirely new Combat Mechanics.
body:
Combat+ adds a variety of new weapons using new combat mechanics. Want some variety of the standard attack cooldown? Try Damage Decay, Damage Combo, or others.

Current new weapons:
* Sickles: linear cooldown only triggering on hit instead of on swing
* Hammers: axe-like variant to sickles
* Scythes: Damage Decay system- damage decrease slightly on hit and recharges over time
* Maces: axe-like variant to Scythes
* Katanas: Combo damage system- damage starts out low, but increases with each successive hit
* Knives: Like weaker swords, but can be thrown with right click
* Arc Stars: A stick grenade that explodes after a short delay, breaking blocks and slowing nearby entities
* Spears: No cooldown
